title: Pentameris insularis

intro: Pentameris insularis, also known as Pentameris insularis or Ischaemum insulare, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
